summary_en: A careful starting point for families and students who want to understand how to verify scholarship information without assuming current benefits or approval.
summary_hi: छात्रों और परिवारों के लिए एक सावधान प्रारंभिक मार्गदर्शिका, जिससे वे बिना अनुमान लगाए छात्रवृत्ति जानकारी की सत्यता जाँच सकें।
eligibility_en: Eligibility varies by provider, year, state, institution type, and current official notice.
benefit_en: Helps students begin careful research before relying on secondary summaries.
documents_required_en: Use only the current official notice to confirm final document requirements.

summary_en: A practical pre-application checklist covering the kinds of documents many scholarship processes may request.
summary_hi: आवेदन से पहले उपयोगी दस्तावेज़ों की एक व्यवहारिक सूची, जो कई छात्रवृत्ति प्रक्रियाओं में काम आ सकती है।
eligibility_en: Useful for students, parents, volunteers, and application helpers.
benefit_en: Can reduce delays by helping families collect likely paperwork early.
documents_required_en: Photo ID, address proof, marksheets, bank details, income records, photographs, and institution documents may be required depending on the scheme.

summary_en: A cautious guide to identifying official portals, current notices, and the right authority before trusting a summary about a scheme.
summary_hi: किसी योजना के सारांश पर भरोसा करने से पहले आधिकारिक पोर्टल, वर्तमान नोटिस और सही प्राधिकरण पहचानने की सावधान मार्गदर्शिका।
eligibility_en: For anyone trying to verify whether a scheme or notice is official and current.
benefit_en: Encourages users to depend on official notifications rather than assumptions.
documents_required_en: No fixed documents for this guide. Always use the relevant official notification.

summary_en: A placeholder structure for future verified listings of Jain schools, colleges, libraries, pathshalas, and study centers.
summary_hi: जैन विद्यालयों, महाविद्यालयों, पुस्तकालयों, पाठशालाओं और अध्ययन केंद्रों की भविष्य की सत्यापित सूची के लिए एक प्लेसहोल्डर संरचना।
eligibility_en: Useful for students, parents, and researchers exploring institution types.
benefit_en: Supports future verified discovery without claiming complete or current listings today.
documents_required_en: Directory browsing does not require documents. Individual institutions may ask for their own admission materials.

title_en: Jain hostels and dharamshala directory placeholder
title_hi: जैन छात्रावास और धर्मशाला निर्देशिका प्लेसहोल्डर
summary_en: A placeholder for future verified city-wise references to Jain hostels, student accommodation, and dharamshala-related support.
summary_hi: जैन छात्रावास, छात्र आवास और धर्मशाला-संबंधी सहायता की भविष्य की सत्यापित नगर-वार सूची के लिए प्लेसहोल्डर।
eligibility_en: Availability depends on location, institution, and local rules.
benefit_en: Helps users understand what kinds of entries JainWorld plans to verify over time.
documents_required_en: Please verify any hostel or stay-related requirements directly with the relevant office.

title_en: Jain trusts and community support directory placeholder
title_hi: जैन ट्रस्ट और सामुदायिक सहायता निर्देशिका प्लेसहोल्डर
summary_en: A safe placeholder for future verified listings of Jain trusts, charities, seva groups, and community support references.
summary_hi: जैन ट्रस्ट, चैरिटी, सेवा समूह और सामुदायिक सहायता संदर्भों की भविष्य की सत्यापित सूची के लिए सुरक्षित प्लेसहोल्डर।
eligibility_en: Support depends on the trust, location, and the type of help being requested.
benefit_en: Sets expectations for future verified directory work without claiming completeness today.
documents_required_en: Any required documents will depend on the organization and support context.

title_en: How to verify official scheme links
title_hi: आधिकारिक योजना लिंक कैसे सत्यापित करें
summary_en: A practical guide to checking whether a scheme link, notice, or portal is official before sharing it with students or families.
summary_hi: छात्रों या परिवारों के साथ साझा करने से पहले यह जांचने की व्यवहारिक मार्गदर्शिका कि कोई योजना लिंक, नोटिस या पोर्टल आधिकारिक है या नहीं।
eligibility_en: Useful for students, parents, volunteers, and resource curators.
benefit_en: Reduces confusion and discourages reliance on outdated or unofficial pages.
documents_required_en: No fixed documents for this guide.

title_en: How to submit a resource correction
summary_en: A simple guide explaining what details help JainWorld review a resource update, broken link, or outdated note.
summary_hi: एक सरल मार्गदर्शिका जो बताती है कि संसाधन अपडेट, टूटा हुआ लिंक या पुरानी जानकारी भेजते समय कौन से विवरण उपयोगी होते हैं।
eligibility_en: Open to students, families, institutions, and volunteers who want to improve public resource quality.
benefit_en: Helps the public corrections workflow stay clearer and more useful over time.
documents_required_en: Please include the page title, the issue noticed, and the best official source link if available.

summary_en: A broad reference entry covering the kinds of support students may look for, such as scholarships, hostels, study centers, and trusted guidance.
summary_hi: एक व्यापक संदर्भ प्रविष्टि जिसमें छात्रवृत्ति, छात्रावास, अध्ययन केंद्र और विश्वसनीय मार्गदर्शन जैसे छात्र सहायता विषय शामिल हैं।
eligibility_en: Useful for students and guardians planning educational support research.
benefit_en: Helps users think in categories before searching for specific verified sources.
documents_required_en: Documents vary by service and provider.

summary_en: A broad family-oriented reference for users seeking practical community, educational, and temple-linked support pathways.
summary_hi: व्यावहारिक सामुदायिक, शैक्षणिक और मंदिर-संबंधी सहायता मार्ग खोजने वाले उपयोगकर्ताओं के लिए परिवार-केंद्रित संदर्भ प्रविष्टि।
eligibility_en: Useful for families, caregivers, volunteers, and community organizers.
benefit_en: Supports safer planning by encouraging users to verify each official source before acting on it.
documents_required_en: Requirements vary by organization and service.
